title: New ClawHub skill: skill-benchmark — grade your skill before you publish
content:
Runs frontmatter/role/goal/format/vague-verb checks and returns a 0-100 score with a letter grade. Stdlib, offline.

  python skill_benchmark.py score <folder>

Free + MIT. Sponsor if useful: GitHub Sponsors / Buy Me a Coffee. ClawHub: clawhub.ai/skills/skills/skill-benchmark
